title: m0d_FILE
description: A supposedly discontinued mod found recently.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47d3cc5929296759afca1ea7d83d8bb3814e82bc.png)
### 
### What is this Mod about?
m0d_File is an ARG MOD, it seeks to tell a story through secrets and theories. The horror or scare aspects are secondary. More things will be added in the future, but the main story is already created.

### Things to keep in mind before playing the Mod:
- The Mod does not support multiplayer. It must be played in SinglePlayer!
- The mod corrupts parts of your world. Do not play on existing servers or they may get ruined!
- None of the story in this mod is real, it's all fictional, just for entertainment purposes.
- It is recommended to use [BSL SHADERS](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders) and ambient mods to best enjoy the mod.
- This mod will not be ported to Fabric, Neoforge or MC Bedrock!
- If you have any suggestions, leave them in the comments!
- Beware of the guardians.

**WARNING:** This mod uses loud, annoying, and saturated sounds. If these types of sounds bother you or you have any problem with them, it's best not to download this mod. You have been warned.
